text:
/ci1 2 動きは素早いけど
攻撃中は無防備になるね！
弱点は中心の赤いところみたい！

/ci1 It may be nimble, but it lets down
its defenses when it attacks! I think its
weak point is the red bit in the center.

動きは素早いけど
攻撃中は無防備になるね！
弱点は中心の赤いところみたい！
It may be nimble, but it lets down its defenses when it attacks! I think its weak point is the red bit in the center.
